name: Flamix
description: Flamix is an advanced decentralized perpetuals exchange native to Flare Network, offering high-leverage trading on crypto, forex, and commodities using any ERC-20 token as collateral. Flamix eliminates price volatility risk from the collateral asset, allowing any asset - from governance tokens to memecoins - to be collateralized without additional liquidation risks. Flamix brings new utility to all tokens in the crypto space, enabling traders to gain exposure to other assets without ever selling their holdings.
